text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio and I are on our way back home from
shopping, when...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. You remember that assignment Prez
gave me?
choice_data_list: To figure out what your trainer means to you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I got an idea, actually!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I was chatting with Scarlet the other day, and...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: I see. What your trainer means to you...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm totally stuck on it! What would you say,
Scarlet?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Sounds like a nice problem to have. I'm still trying
to find a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: But I suppose if I had to give an answer, I'd say...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
A trainer is someone who'd help me achieve my
dreams. My most valuable partner.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Trainers devote themselves to supporting their
trainees, and we devote ourselves to meeting
their expectations in return.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
By working together, we can climb higher.
Something like that, anyway.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wow, really? I see...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
What's with that face? You're not thinking of
doing something weird, are you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
No way! Not at all! I'll just store this away in the
ol' noggin for later. Thanks! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: What do you think about what she said, Trainer?
choice_data_list: It's a model answer.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Right? Of course the model student would say
something like that! So I was thinking...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I could tweak it a little, put in my own words, and
tell it to Prez! Whaddya think?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Am I smooth or what? ♪
choice_data_list: That's surely against the rules.
That's surely against the rules.
I'd rather you really look at me.
I'd rather you really look at me.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Am I smooth or what? ♪
choice_data_list: That's surely against the rules.
That's surely against the rules.
I'd rather you really look at me.
I'd rather you really look at me.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Bleh. I know...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: But I used my brain to figure it out!
choice_data_list:
You think she'll be pleased with someone else's
answer?

You think she'll be pleased with someone else's
answer?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, no... But I don't think there's any way she'll
find out either.
choice_data_list: That's not the point.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hmph! Then what is?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Teio looks at me with disappointment. I tell her if
she wishes to surpass Rudolf, she'll have to follow
her example in more than just races.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Urk...
choice_data_list: Is the Prez that you look up to a cheater?
Is the Prez that you look up to a cheater?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...You're right. Her conscience is so sparkly clean
it hurts to look at.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...I'm sorry. I'll figure out the answer by myself.
choice_data_list:
Let's find an answer that'll really knock her
socks off!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: All right! And Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Thanks for scolding me! I appreciate it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Tokai Teio understand what she did wrong
and apologize gives me the feeling she has grown
a little.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list: Those words are what Scarlet believes, not you.
Those words are what Scarlet believes, not you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Well, yeah. But it's still a great answer, right?
choice_data_list: But that's not who I am to you...
But that's not who I am to you...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her I'm shocked and saddened that she won't
even consider how she really feels about me.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: W-wait! I didn't mean it like that!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Aaah! Don't look so sad! That's not what I meant!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For some reason, Tokai Teio is the one who looks
to be on the edge of tears now.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... I'm sorry, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'll try to think about what you mean to me
properly this time.
choice_data_list:
Let's find an answer that'll really knock her
socks off!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: All right! And Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Thanks for stopping me! I appreciate it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Tokai Teio understand what she did wrong
and apologize gives me the feeling she has grown
a little.
